name: Kalo
description: Kalo is a mobile app that allows users to track various health and fitness metrics, including calorie and macro intake, micronutrients, exercise, sleep, mood, and more. It also provides features such as meal planning, recipe search, and community challenges.
features: Dynamic Calorie Adjustment - auto-adjusts from exercise
Psychology / Behavioural Tools - 28-day curriculum + daily quizzes
target_audience: Individuals interested in tracking their health and fitness metrics

name: UK News Now
description: UK News Now is a covert evidence gathering tool disguised as a news reader. It appears as a standard UK & world news app whilst silently capturing, logging, and securing evidence in the background. Features include curated UK & world headlines with breaking news alerts, covert evidence gathering with an AI companion trained in domestic & narcissistic abuse support, timestamped and geotagged journal entries for legally admissible evidence, silent recording and silent photo capture whilst browsing the news, and a secure encrypted vault with remote server backup.
features: Curated UK & world news headlines with breaking news alerts
Covert evidence gathering with AI companion for domestic & narcissistic abuse support
Timestamped and geotagged journal entries for legally admissible evidence
Silent audio recording whilst browsing the news page
Secure encrypted vault with remote server backup
Disguised as a standard news reader app
target_audience: Individuals in vulnerable domestic situations who need to gather evidence discreetly whilst staying informed about UK & world news

name: Write AI
description: The app appears to be a note-taking and organization tool with features for editing, image upload, search, backup, tracking, analytics, health, share, map, authentication, and article management. It also includes features for message handling, push notifications, and secure data storage.
target_audience: Students or professionals seeking to optimize their workflow and productivity

name: MindScape
description: The app uses a full-screen WebView to display web content, suggesting it is designed for educational purposes. The presence of premium features and audio support implies that the app may offer interactive or multimedia content.
target_audience: Adults interested in learning through web-based content

name: UK News Now
description: The app appears to be a news aggregator that provides access to news articles, journal entries, and other content. It includes features such as image sharing, geolocation, and secure storage for sensitive information.
target_audience: Individuals seeking news and information on various topics
